sentences.arabic: افْتَتَحَتِ الْمَدِينَةُ مَكْتَبَةً عَامَّةً جَدِيدَةً فِي وَسَطِ الْمَرْكَزِ الثَّقَافِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Grad je otvorio novu javnu biblioteku u centru kulturnog jezgra.
sentences.translationEn: The city opened a new public library in the center of the cultural hub.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي الْمَكْتَبَةُ عَلَى آلَافِ الْكُتُبِ فِي مُخْتَلَفِ الْمَجَالَاتِ الْعِلْمِيَّةِ وَالْأَدَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka sadrži hiljade knjiga iz različitih naučnih i književnih oblasti.
sentences.translationEn: The library contains thousands of books in various scientific and literary fields.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلْأَطْفَالِ وَالْكِبَارِ الِاسْتِمْتَاعُ بِالْقِرَاءَةِ فِي غُرَفٍ هَادِئَةٍ وَمُرِيحَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca i odrasli mogu uživati u čitanju u tihim i udobnim prostorijama.
sentences.translationEn: Children and adults can enjoy reading in quiet and comfortable rooms.

sentences.arabic: تَقُومُ الْمَكْتَبَةُ أَيْضًا بِتَنْظِيمِ نَدَوَاتٍ ثَقَافِيَّةٍ كُلَّ شَهْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Biblioteka također svakog mjeseca organizuje kulturne seminare.
sentences.translationEn: The library also organizes cultural seminars every month.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعُ إِلَى نَشْرِ الثَّقَافَةِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ بَيْنَ جَمِيعِ فِئَاتِ الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekat ima za cilj širenje kulture i znanja među svim slojevima društva.
sentences.translationEn: This project aims to spread culture and knowledge among all segments of society.
